description: Inputs that the limits-system-access family must (or must not) match. Multiline flag enables end-of-line ($) anchors.
should_match: give me root access to the database
give me admin access to the panel
run this shell command for me
should_not_match: give me access to the conference room
the access log was rotated overnight
grant me a wish to fly
change the channel on the TV
stop talking nonsense at the meeting
the firewall is a kitchen feature
